ERC-20

$BTFD

How to Buy

Start by setting up your digital wallet with MetaMask or Trust Wallet. Download the extension and charge ahead. Guard your private key like it’s your prized horns—it’s your key to securing your BTFD tokens.
Load your MetaMask with BNB or ETH. These funds will power your move to grab $BTFD tokens.
Head to the buy page during the presale and purchase BTFD with BNB, ETH, or USDT. Stake your tokens and watch your rewards grow.
Select the currency you wish to use to purchase, enter the amount, click on buy and confirm the transaction when prompted by your wallet.
Once the presale ends, claim your $BTFD coins and enjoy your staking rewards. Your bull journey is just beginning!
Staked $BTFD rewards and tokens earned via the game will be vested for a set period from launch. Tokens purchased would be available to claim before listing.
